mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_route (id, ak, welink_session_id, tool_session_id, source_type, source_instance, user_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{ak}, #{welinkSessionId}, #{toolSessionId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceInstance}, #{userId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM session_route WHERE welink_session_id = #{welinkSessionId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM session_route WHERE tool_session_id = #{toolSessionId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE session_route SET source_instance = #{newSourceInstance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE ak = #{ak} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE session_route SET status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE source_instance = #{sourceInstance} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE session_route SET status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND updated_at < #{cutoffTime}
